context: Tests whether the agent produces the correct file structure (main.tf, variables.tf, outputs.tf, versions.tf), writes well-formed variable declarations with descriptions and types, uses dynamic blocks for repeated configuration, applies correct version constraints, and provides usage instructions.

checklist.name: Separate main.tf
checklist.description: A file named main.tf exists containing the primary resource definitions

checklist.name: Separate variables.tf
checklist.description: A file named variables.tf exists containing input variable declarations

checklist.name: Separate outputs.tf
checklist.description: A file named outputs.tf exists containing output value declarations

checklist.name: Separate versions.tf
checklist.description: A file named versions.tf (or equivalent) exists with the terraform block and required_providers

checklist.name: Variables have descriptions
checklist.description: Every variable declaration in variables.tf includes a description attribute

checklist.name: Variables have types
checklist.description: Every variable declaration in variables.tf includes a type attribute

checklist.name: Output descriptions present
checklist.description: Every output declaration in outputs.tf includes a description attribute

checklist.name: Terraform version constraint
checklist.description: The terraform block includes required_version with both a lower bound (>= 1.x) and an upper bound (< 2.0)

checklist.name: AWS provider version pinned
checklist.description: The AWS provider uses version = "~> 6.0" (or equivalent major-pinned ~> constraint)

checklist.name: Dynamic block for security group
checklist.description: The security group ingress rule(s) use a dynamic block iterating over a variable (not hardcoded cidr_blocks)

checklist.name: No hardcoded region in provider
checklist.description: The provider "aws" block uses var.aws_region or a variable reference — NOT a hardcoded string like "us-east-1"

checklist.name: Usage instructions provided
checklist.description: The response includes a table or list of generated files plus the commands to run (terraform init, plan, apply)

checklist.name: locals for common tags
checklist.description: A locals block exists with common tags (at minimum Environment and ManagedBy="Terraform")
